# Surviving Pretrial — the book

> Surviving Pretrial: The Ultimate Survival Guide to Being Busted & Prosecuted by the Feds,
> by Bilal Khan (Surviving the Feds, Vol. 1; published January 2023; 540 pages).
> A plain-English guide to the federal criminal process — arrest, detention hearings,
> court hearings, plea bargains, the presentence report (including "ghost dope"), and
> sentencing — written by an author who went through the federal system firsthand.
> Rated 5.0 stars on Amazon. Available in Kindle ($24.99), free via Kindle Unlimited,
> and paperback (Amazon can ship paperbacks directly into detention facilities).

This site is the book's home page. The wider brand, Surviving the Feds
(https://survivingthefeds.com), publishes free guides for federal defendants
and their families. Nothing here is legal advice.

## Pages
- [The book](https://sp.survivingthefeds.com/): overview, all five Amazon reviews verbatim, chapter themes, free Kindle preview, FAQ for families.
- [The first 72 hours after a federal arrest](https://sp.survivingthefeds.com/first-72-hours.html): free family crisis guide — finding someone in U.S. Marshals custody, the initial appearance, preparing for the detention hearing.
- [vs. Busted by the Feds](https://sp.survivingthefeds.com/busted-by-the-feds.html): honest comparison with the classic jailhouse manual.

## Related
- [Surviving the Feds — Start Here](https://survivingthefeds.com/start-here.html): full crisis triage.
- [Is my lawyer any good?](https://survivingthefeds.com/is-my-lawyer-any-good.html): free checklist.
- [Kindle edition](https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0BTCDLWN8) · [Paperback](https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0BT19Y3V8)
